qa_pair.question: Find the project created in Q2 2024 with the highest number of completed tasks. What is the project name?
Search for issues labeled as "bug" that were closed in March 2024. Which user closed the most issues? Provide their username.
Look for pull requests that modified files in the /api directory and were merged between January 1 and January 31, 2024. How many different contributors worked on these PRs?
Find the repository with the most stars that was created before 2023. What is the repository name?
What is the total count of users who have logged in within the last 30 days?
Which team has the highest number of active projects in Q1 2024?
Find the most recently created channel in the #engineering organization. What is its name?
List all repositories that were archived in 2023. How many are there?
What is the email address of the user who created the most issues in January 2024?
Find the workspace with the highest number of active members as of December 31, 2023.
